title: Can't build skopeo on FreeBSD
body:
There are two bugs that prevent skopeo from building on FreeBSD:

1. Can't find gpgme.h. This should be easy fix in Makefile, probably FreeBSD should be treated the same way as macOS: 
```
# github.com/mtrmac/gpgme
vendor/github.com/mtrmac/gpgme/data.go:4:11: fatal error: 'gpgme.h' file not found
 #include <gpgme.h>
          ^~~~~~~~~
1 error generated.
```

2. Some bug in `mounter_freebsd.go`:
```
# github.com/containers/storage/pkg/mount
vendor/github.com/containers/storage/pkg/mount/mounter_freebsd.go:28:6: mount redeclared in this block
	previous declaration at vendor/github.com/containers/storage/pkg/mount/mounter_unsupported.go:5:69
```

comments.body:
I've found out that FreeBSD support was removed on purpose: https://github.com/containers/storage/commit/2c0f1b3e01dd2c6e6555c778f3c54c9b62452127
I've managed to fix skopeo so that it works perfectly fine on FreeBSD:
```
$ ./bin/skopeo inspect docker://quay.io/skopeo/stable:latest


{
    "Name": "quay.io/skopeo/stable",
    "Digest": "sha256:97cd68ce5f62f1fb3957eb94cc4927813520ff9fb3343868048e35ef46dc61a1",
    "RepoTags": [
        "v0.1.42-dev",
        "v1.0.0",
        "v1.1.0",
        "v1.1.1",
        "v1.2.0-s390x",
        "v1.2.0-ppc64le",
        "v1.2.0-amd64",
        "v1.2.0",
        "master",
        "latest"
    ],
    "Created": "2021-01-14T22:25:22.740136032Z",
    "DockerVersion": "19.03.11",
    "Labels": {
        "license": "MIT",
        "name": "fedora",
        "vendor": "Fedora Project",
        "version": "32"
    },
    "Architecture": "amd64",
    "Os": "linux",
    "Layers": [
        "sha256:24185ac4b785c62beec15bc77f8ee0ca25025c9848b22d67148728361edd80a5",
        "sha256:ecc97e94453ac358eda843c28e720b298c708c76359cf2c4125a45d94455cffb",
        "sha256:ed0fe3e27a1b94c5b5c56f55b63b1fa5c2ab352076d9f188e3d1738180757c71",
        "sha256:d89f218a4029205fdf8d935f5a4287d6c4f52494276bd3e920293c1ad69c7684",
        "sha256:9c33768fdbaa14d19d90d86aef22aa61ddc2f3a319a245b30e2ac0cfaac73ab5",
        "sha256:dde48ad4015ad4b7565a49778077e9ea9e3f01a7b495ef2f3353a2dcd315fdb5"
    ],
    "Env": [
        "DISTTAG=f32container",
        "FGC=f32",
        "container=oci",
        "PATH=/usr/local/sbin:/usr/local/bin:/usr/sbin:/usr/bin:/sbin:/bin",
        "REGISTRY_AUTH_FILE=/auth.json"
    ]
}
```

Would you accept PR with fixes for FreeBSD and make it supported again?
Yes, as long as community agrees to maintain it.

Makefile on FreeBSD works since https://github.com/containers/skopeo/pull/1165 has been merged.
The last missing bits are fixes for storage module:
 https://github.com/containers/storage/pull/806
@rhatdan PR since https://github.com/containers/storage/pull/806 is merged, could you please release new version and update vendor modules? Thank you. :-)
I'm closing this issue as FreeBSD support landed in master: https://github.com/containers/skopeo/commit/a6e50d32d235115a6d0bf80e26f470fc62cf95a4
